name: chimpanzee_chr18_centromere
description: Pan troglodytes chr18 centromere / pericentromere. Alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array; 13-monomer HOR unit (~2223 bp). T2T-resolved alpha-sat array; flanked by ape-lineage DYZ_chimp_satellite satellite blocks. Centromere mapping is HOR-aware; LLmap should refuse to silently collapse cross-species divergence here.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers in 13-mer HOR units, tandemly arrayed over 1.9 Mb
